---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Mahshad Sarikhani"
toc: false
page-layout: full
grid:
  body-width: 1000px
  margin-width: 200px
listing:
  - id: hero-notes
    contents: 
      - "notes/**/*.qmd"
      - "!notes/index.qmd"
    type: custom
    template: assets/templates/hero-note.ejs
    max-items: 3
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [title, date, maturity, path, description]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
---

::: {.hero-section}

::: {.hero-left}
[A personal site, periodically updated]{.eyebrow}

[Mahshad *Sarikhani*]{.hero-name}

[MD · imaging AI researcher · finding what hides in medical data]{.hero-tagline}

::: {.hero-bio}
A doctor who codes. 
I work where abdominal radiology meets machine learning, mostly on **inflammatory bowel disease**, building tools that turn medical imaging into something measurable.
:::
:::

::: {.hero-notes}
::: {.notes-label}
[recent notes]{} [[all →](notes/index.qmd)]{}
:::

::: {#hero-notes}
:::
:::

:::

## Selected *work*

::: {.proof-grid}

::: {.proof-card .proof-card--anchor}
::: {.card-label}
ESGAR 2026 · Oral Presentation
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Motility MRI as a biomarker in ulcerative colitis](research/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
Quantitative colonic motility MRI mapped against endoscopic disease activity, in collaboration with Motilent. The first work of its kind in ulcerative colitis.
:::
::: {.card-stat}
**June 2026** · Vienna
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card .proof-card--quote}
::: {.card-label}
On obsession
:::
::: {.quote-text}
[Creation is about edited obsession. It is knowing what to keep and, more importantly, what to set on fire.]{.quote-text}
:::
::: {.quote-author}
Jonathan Anderson
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card}
::: {.card-label}
Live Tool
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Lemann Index Calculator](projects/lemann-calculator/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
A Streamlit app for computing cumulative bowel damage in Crohn's disease.
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card}
::: {.card-label}
In Progress
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Agentic MRE Pipeline](projects/mre-pipeline/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
Using LLMs to extract structured data from free-text radiology reports.
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card}
::: {.card-label}
Personal Project
:::
::: {.card-title}
[Bookshelf Scanner](projects/bookshelf-scanner/index.qmd)
:::
::: {.card-desc}
A vision-language tool for cataloging a bilingual personal library.
:::
:::

::: {.proof-card .proof-card--now}
::: {.card-label}
What's on my mind
:::
::: {.now-text}
Currently learning about Bayesian modeling and workflows. Reading papers on *agentic ai*. Also reading *The sacred and the profane*, 
a book by Mircea Eliade.
 
:::
::: {.now-date}
Updated April 2026
:::
:::

:::

---

::: {style="text-align: center; margin: 2rem 0; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #5a7260; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase;"}
[About](about/index.qmd) · [Research](research/index.qmd) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iKhNW9AAAAAJ) · [GitHub](https://github.com/MahshadSa)
:::
